title: Revenue Share, Automated Tipover Detection, Opportunity Zones, and Virtual Parking Coach
summary: Detailed breakdown of Veo's 2025 operational improvements. Revenue share: 15c/trip yielded ~$50K to city (exempting Access and opportunity zone trips). Automated tipover detection reduced proactive cure time from 16 hours to 4 hours 45 minutes despite 140 more tipped vehicles per day -- unprecedented improvement across all Veo markets. Opportunity zones designed with DPW based on low car ownership, household income, and transit gaps: riders automatically refunded $1 unlock fee when ending in designated areas, $130K+ returned to riders, zones expanded mid-year and flexible to council input. Virtual parking coach (AI-powered, August launch): 10K corrective parking actions in real time. New real-time rider analysis rolling out: detects hard swerves, impacts, and auto-slows speed; vehicle 'perception' system takes damaged vehicles out of service. 311-style complaint response: 92% under 3 hours (up from 77%), median 2hr 11min. Van fleet up 33%, labor hours up 22%, 40+ Syracuse residents employed, 80%+ city proper residents.
